name: Jewelry Stores
title: WhatsApp Bot for Jewelry Stores | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate gold rate quotes, showcase design catalogs, and pre-qualify high-value buyers 24/7 with a custom WhatsApp bot for jewelry showrooms.
painPoint: High-value prospects drop off when waiting hours for custom pricing quotes on daily gold rates or specific ornament availability.
example: A client texts asking for 22k gold bracelet availability. The bot queries your inventory database, calculates pricing dynamically using live market gold rates, and replies with HD design cards in under a second.

name: Coaching Institutes & Schools
title: WhatsApp Bot for Coaching Institutes & Schools | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate student lead capture, answer course queries, and book trial classes 24/7 with a custom WhatsApp chatbot built for coaching centers.
painPoint: Front-desk staff spends hours answering repetitive questions about fee structures, batch timings, and course syllabus instead of closing enrollments.
example: A student texts asking about NEET prep batches. The bot checks Google Sheets, sends the timing options, gathers their name and phone, and schedules a free trial class instantly.

name: Clinics & Hospitals
title: WhatsApp Bot for Clinics & Hospitals | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate doctor appointments, patient lead triage, and follow-ups 24/7. Direct Meta API WhatsApp bot with Zero recurring platform fees.
painPoint: Staff is overwhelmed during morning rushes, leading to unanswered calls, patient queue delays, and missed appointments.
example: A patient asks for doctor availability on Wednesday. The bot checks your hospital database, proposes open slots, registers the patient, and sends a booking confirmation with a map location.

name: Salons & Spas
title: WhatsApp Bot for Salons & Spas | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate appointment bookings, stylist scheduling, and send no-show reminders on auto-pilot with a custom salon WhatsApp bot integration.
painPoint: Last-minute cancellations and no-shows leave open slots that cost salons thousands in lost revenue daily.
example: A client requests a hair spa session. The bot lists available stylists, schedules the booking, and sends automated reminder notifications 24 hours and 2 hours before the slot.

name: Real Estate Agents
title: WhatsApp Bot for Real Estate | Property Leads Automation | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate property lead capture, send PDF catalogs, and filter buyers by budget 24/7 with an AI-powered WhatsApp bot for real estate.
painPoint: Brokers waste hours calling unqualified leads who are 'just browsing' or don't match the budget requirements of active listings.
example: A homebuyer searches for 3BHK flats. The bot asks for their budget and preferred location, filters active inventory, sends brochure PDFs, and routes qualified buyers to your phone.

name: Malls & Retail Complexes
title: WhatsApp Bot for Malls & Retail Complexes | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate tenant directory lookup, share ongoing store offers, and answer parking queries 24/7 with a custom retail WhatsApp bot.
painPoint: Visitors struggle to find store locations, running promotions, or customer service desks, leading to a degraded retail experience.
example: A mall visitor texts asking for Zara's floor location. The bot replies instantly with 'First Floor, Wing B', and shows active discounts running at the store.

name: Gyms & Fitness Centers
title: WhatsApp Bot for Gyms & Fitness Centers | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate gym membership renewals, trainer scheduling, and trial booking 24/7 with a custom WhatsApp automation bot for fitness centers.
painPoint: Gyms lose up to 30% of members simply because they forget to renew on time, and staff fails to follow up manually.
example: A member's plan expires in 3 days. The bot automatically sends a personalized renewal warning containing a direct UPI payment link to complete the transaction.

name: Restaurants & Cafes
title: WhatsApp Bot for Restaurants & Cafes | Order & Booking | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate table reservations, display digital menus, and handle takeaway orders directly on WhatsApp 24/7 with a custom restaurant bot.
painPoint: Third-party delivery platforms take massive 20-30% commissions, destroying profit margins for local restaurants and cafes.
example: A customer opens WhatsApp, browses your interactive food menu, selects items, inputs delivery address, and completes a direct UPI order without platform cuts.

name: Travel Agencies
title: WhatsApp Bot for Travel Agencies | Package Booking | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Pre-qualify travel leads, distribute itinerary PDFs, and handle booking queries 24/7 with a custom WhatsApp automation bot.
painPoint: Agents spend hours explaining package options to window shoppers who ultimately book elsewhere.
example: A client inquires about Himachal tours. The bot asks for duration and budget, sends pre-configured package PDFs, and collects contact info for customization.

name: Wedding Planners & Venues
title: WhatsApp Bot for Wedding Planners & Venues | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate venue availability checks, send catalog pricing, and pre-qualify clients 24/7 with a custom WhatsApp bot for event planners.
painPoint: Event managers lose leads during busy wedding seasons due to slow response times for venue pricing and capacity details.
example: A client requests a quote for a 500-guest banquet. The bot checks the venue calendar, sends base pricing packages, and registers details for a physical tour.

name: Furniture Showrooms
title: WhatsApp Bot for Furniture Showrooms | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Showcase catalog designs, automate size queries, and book showroom visits 24/7 with a custom WhatsApp bot for home decor brands.
painPoint: Customers repeatedly ask for dimensions, wood types, and shipping costs on individual items, tying up active sales reps.
example: A buyer queries about a sofa set. The bot outputs color variants, dimensions, wood options, delivery estimates, and invites them to book a showroom visit.

name: Automobile Dealerships
title: WhatsApp Bot for Automobile Dealerships & Service Centers | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate test drives, schedule vehicle service slots, and send service reminders 24/7 with a custom dealership WhatsApp bot.
painPoint: Service centers lose repeat business because they forget to follow up with clients when their vehicle's periodic service is due.
example: A vehicle's service is due. The bot sends a reminder, lets the owner select their preferred time slot, reserves it in the service calendar, and sends confirmation.

name: Coaching Institutes & Schools
title: YouTube Automation for Coaching Institutes & Schools | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate study guide videos, daily quizzes, and batch announcement reels programmatically on YouTube and Instagram for coaching centers.
painPoint: Educators waste hours editing repetitive lecture clips, rendering slides, and manually posting content on social channels.
example: A Python script reads your mock test questions, auto-generates dynamic study quiz slides with realistic TTS audio, compiles it to MP4, and schedules it to YouTube Shorts.

name: Jewelry Brands
title: Instagram Reels Automation for Jewelry Brands | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate jewelry catalog video rendering and schedule Reels uploads programmatically without manual graphic design overhead.
painPoint: High-end showrooms struggle to generate the massive volume of vertical video content required by social algorithms to stay visible.
example: Your inventory spreadsheet gets updated with a new necklace. The script pulls the high-res image, renders a panning video with dynamic price tags, and auto-posts it.

name: Real Estate Agents
title: Content Pipelines for Real Estate Brokers | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Automate property listings video tours and schedule daily multi-platform distribution on YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels.
painPoint: Agents have zero time to record, edit, and post property tour videos across 5 different social networks every day.
example: A backend pipeline ingests raw property photos, overlays neighborhood stats and pricing, renders a transition-rich Tour Short, and pushes it to Reels, YouTube, and Facebook.

name: Jewelry Showrooms
title: 3D Interactive Websites for Jewelry Showrooms | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Build immersive 3D showrooms with interactive WebGL product viewers to showcase your premium jewelry collections online in high fidelity.
painPoint: Flat 2D websites fail to convey the premium look, shine, and detailed craftsmanship of luxury gold and diamond ornaments.
example: A user visits your site and spins a high-fidelity 3D model of a diamond ring, zooms in to see the details, changes gold color options, and clicks to book in-store trial.

name: Coaching Institutes
title: High-Performance Websites for Coaching Institutes | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Build lightning-fast React websites for coaching institutes, with integrated student admission portals and course directories.
painPoint: Slow-loading WordPress platforms drop student admission leads and crash during result announcements due to bad server scaling.
example: A static-pre-rendered admission site built with Vite that loads in under 0.5s, features search filters for courses, and scales effortlessly to handle 10k+ concurrent users.

name: Clinics & Hospitals
title: Medical & Clinic Websites with Booking Portals | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Build secure, HIPAA-compliant React websites for clinics and doctors, with fast-loading schedules and direct appointment integration.
painPoint: Patients bounce off medical websites when they can't easily find doctor availability or when the online booking calendar is slow.
example: A clinic site with clean SEO pages for each doctor, an instant scheduling portal, and automated SMS confirmation connected directly to patient records.

name: Malls & Retail complexes
title: Interactive Websites for Malls & Retail Centers | Gurdharam
metaDescription: Create high-end React websites for retail malls, featuring interactive maps, dynamic tenant directories, and live brand promotion logs.
painPoint: Shoppers struggle to find which shops are open, causing friction in mall attendance and reducing footfall for minor tenants.
example: A custom web application with interactive floor layouts, search bars for finding specific brands, and a dynamic database showing real-time mall deals.
